prompt:
Using REFERENCE_0 as the character and outfit base, transform the cosplay photo into a polished Japanese anime magazine-cover illustration. Keep the same character identity, silver hair with blue ribbon, blue qipao-style dress, red hip cord, black thigh-high stockings, heels, and elegant gold details, but redraw everything as crisp 2D anime art with clean linework, glossy highlights, and flowing dynamic hair.

Pose and composition: change the seated reaching pose into a full-body floating/leaping pin-up pose on a clean white background. Show the character angled diagonally, one leg bent upward across the foreground and the other leg extending down, with arms relaxed outward and hair/ribbons sweeping dramatically around her. Add scattered blue petal shapes for motion.

Magazine design additions: make it look like a fashion/anime cover with a large red serif masthead across the top reading HOKUE U. Add small decorative English cover text in red/gray near the top, including two short blocks, one on the left and one near the upper right. Add a bottom-left magazine info block with red text reading IREYREY 2.0, tiny Japanese-style subtext, and a barcode.

Style: high-end anime key visual, bright white negative space, saturated deep blue clothing, pale luminous skin, red eyes, delicate blush, sharp fabric shine, detailed hair strands, editorial poster layout. Avoid photorealism; do not retain the original floor or camera perspective.
